method: exhaustive grep of awk|grep|sed|free|df|ps|uname|date|/proc/* + ssh-client stderr capture sites; classify each as SAFE / FRAGILE / GUARDED

patterns_audited.reason: kernel sysfs — content is English literal regardless of userland locale

OpenSSH client stderr (Could not resolve hostname / Connection refused / Connection timed out / Permission denied / Host key verification failed / No route to host) localizes via LC_MESSAGES → case-pattern miss → reason="unknown(rc=$rc)" → silent mis-classification of probe failures
matches our own remote `echo OK` literal — output we control
positional only, no localized text match
ASCII annotation in source files, not command output
TSV file written by this script — controlled format
operates on PSI float string captured from /proc/pressure/memory
PSI string captured from kernel sysfs
L5 Bayes history file — fields written by this script
stderr captured by _run_ssh_with_reconnect tee/case-match — same English-literal exposure

_err_tail tail-then-case-match (lines 1241-1245) on Connection timed out / Network unreachable / No route to host / Connection reset / kex_exchange_identification / Could not resolve hostname — Korean/CJK locale → translated → _is_net=0 → silent non-retry of legitimate network blips
tail itself is locale-immune; the captured content's locale is what mattered (now guarded above)
macOS sysctl emits C-locale numeric tuple `{ x.x x.x x.x }`
stderr suppressed (2>/dev/null), only rc tested → no parsing
Go-template emits literal Go bool — locale-immune

fixes_applied.rationale: _probe_host case-match at lines 143-157 tests English ssh-client error literals (Could not resolve hostname / Connection timed out / Permission denied / Host key verification failed / No route to host)
_run_ssh_once is invoked when HEXA_REMOTE_NO_RECONNECT=1 (debug); harmless to also guard

_run_ssh_with_reconnect _err_tail case-match at lines 1241-1245 (after edits: 1245-1249) tests English network-class signatures: Connection timed out / Operation timed out / Network is unreachable / No route to host / Connection reset by peer / Connection closed by / kex_exchange_identification / banner exchange / Could not resolve hostname / Name or service not known. Korean/CJK Mac locale would silently disable network-blip retry path (raw#41 external-resource-roaming) — drilled jobs would skip retry on transient DNS/banner failures.

validation.execution: DID_NOT_RUN — per task constraint (would trigger remote ssh probes)

notes: Total awk/grep/sed/locale-relevant sites audited: 35 (32 in hexa_remote + 3 in hexa resolver)

Pattern: LC_ALL=C goes on the LOCAL `ssh` client invocation, NOT inside the remote command (already guarded for `free` since 2026-04-25). The local ssh client emits its own error messages (DNS / connection / auth / banner) that get captured and case-matched.
/proc/pressure/memory and /proc/* generally are kernel sysfs — content is C-locale regardless of userland LANG. SAFE.
Internal TSV files (queue, history, psi_queue) we wrote ourselves with printf — SAFE.
uname/stat/sysctl/date+%s — all kernel/syscall primitives that emit C literals or numeric. SAFE.
docker inspect -f '{{.State.Running}}' uses Go template — emits Go bool literal. SAFE.
Resolver hexa's ssh probe (line 163) suppresses stderr entirely. SAFE.
